_metadata.title: ComplianceLint Interim Standard for EU AI Act Article 43: Conformity Assessment
_metadata.disclaimer: This is an interim standard developed by ComplianceLint. It will be superseded by the CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard.
basis: EU AI Act Annexes VI and VII
_metadata.awaiting_standard: CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard for Art. 43 (expected Q4 2026)

requirements.title: Conformity Assessment Completion
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST complete a conformity assessment per the applicable procedure (Annex VI or VII) before market placement.
requirements.rationale: Art. 43(1)-(2) mandates conformity assessment before placing on market.
acceptable_implementations: Annex VI internal control self-assessment with documentation
Annex VII assessment with notified body involvement
Sectoral conformity assessment per Annex I legislation

requirements.title: Substantial Modification Tracking
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST have a process to identify substantial modifications and trigger re-assessment.
requirements.rationale: Art. 43(4) requires new assessment on substantial modification.
acceptable_implementations: Change management process with classification criteria
Version control with modification impact assessment
Change review board for AI system modifications
